prompt: I need to build a 5-year SaaS revenue model from scratch. Here are the assumptions: we start Year 1 with 500 customers paying $200/month each. We expect 20% customer growth YoY and 5% annual price increases. Monthly churn is 2%. Build me the full IDFA-compliant model specification — every Named Range, every formula — before writing anything to Excel.
assertions: Every input assumption has a Named Range with Inp_ prefix
All calculation formulas reference Named Ranges only — zero cell-coordinate references
Churn is modeled correctly: 2% monthly churn compounds to ~21.5% annual attrition
The specification includes MRR and ARR calculations
Year-over-year naming convention uses _Y1, _Y2 etc. dimension suffixes consistently
